mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of John B. Hylton
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of John B. Hylton Samuel G. Hylton, Administrator Allie Ann Hylton, Widow F.M. Hylton, Son S.G. Hylton, Son A.M. Dickerson,Daughter Ann C. Castle, Daughter A.E. Hylton, Son Z.A. Smith, Daughter Lezena I. Hylton, Daughter Jacob Hylton, Son E.B. Hylton, Son Recorded in ledger book 5, page 143, in the Floyd County Courthouse
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
